overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in Cyberpunk 2077's Emery Plaza at dusk. The scene features modern architecture with neon lighting, palm trees, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians along a paved walkway beside calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront plaza entrance with benches

events.description: game UI text 'Emery Plaza' appears in lower left corner identifying the location
pedestrian in orange shirt stands up from bench and stretches arms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past seated pedestrians and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt standing up from bench and stretching arms
person in green jacket leaning on waterfront railing looking at water

entered.detail: modern multi-story building with glass facade and cyan neon lighting
metal and glass safety railing along the water edge with wooden bench seating
tall palm trees lining the promenade against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront plaza at dusk, with the camera walking past the Emery Plaza building on the right. Several NPCs are seated on benches along the water's edge, with one person standing up and stretching. The area is lit by a mix of natural sunset light and artificial neon from the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with digital advertising kiosk

events.description: exiting the covered building area into more open promenade space
passing a brightly lit digital advertising kiosk on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade passing pedestrians and approaching a digital advertising display

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top walking toward camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: tall illuminated digital display showing colorful advertisements with '11' visible
concrete steps leading down to lower plaza level with seating areas

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the covered plaza entrance into a more open waterfront area, passing a digital advertising kiosk on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the wide concrete promenade, while the palm trees draw closer as the camera advances toward a large distant billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier with expansive water views and distant city skyline

events.description: ambient light decreases as camera moves further from building lights into darker open area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the end of the pier with expansive water and city views ahead

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements visible against the dusk sky
futuristic towers and industrial structures visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide pier area with unobstructed views of the water and distant city skyline. The camera approaches a large digital billboard while moving away from the plaza buildings, resulting in slightly darker ambient lighting. The palm trees now appear closer as the walkway extends toward the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered architectural plaza toward an expansive, open-air waterfront pier at dusk. It begins by walking past the Emery Plaza building, where NPCs lounge on benches under a blend of sunset light and artificial neon. As the camera moves from the covered entrance into the open air, it passes a digital advertising kiosk and navigates through pedestrians on a wide concrete promenade. The scene then expands as the camera advances past towering palm trees, shifting away from the buildings into a darker ambient light. Finally, the movement culminates in a wide pier area with unobstructed views of the water and the distant city skyline, ending as the camera approaches a large digital billboard.
